name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=09d48bdbd4b8ddf9fe07d5d138e3d473ee45ee12a2b0cb34544e9baf3bb18f2d0cefbc77726f8f2f9f1b4f1544e1b72d87225e166aa3a9be
‘I Love the Smell of a Construction Site’ – Trump Kicks Off Massive Infrastructure Push

- The Daily Caller

“There’s no better place to begin the campaign of infrastructure than right here in Ohio,” President Donald J. Trump told workers near Cleveland, Ohio, on Thursday. The President explained that his entire professional life has been about building things. “I love it. I love the smell of a construction site. Right? There’s just something about it.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=133c879a6e63b1b7d0c84d003b6d468f3156d735215e0a9e005459a39db98cc9ce1ce57aeefc0ef4451166016ba9c691a8338c01050c70de

Trump Tells Union Crowd That US Has Best Economy Ever

- The New York Post

On Thursday, to a crowd of “cheering union members,” President Trump made the case for why the U.S. economy is in the best shape in its history. The President cited job creation, falling unemployment claims, and recent progress on trade deals as evidence for America’s economic turnaround.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=133c879a6e63b1b74ee321bd6f8f71be808aaf13d93ba83bf21bf767ee102d0a525d1c1116fbeefe5af759afbd3430e1fccd9dbafee096c6

U.S. Fourth-Quarter Growth Revised Up to 2.9 Percent; Consumer Spending Surges

- Reuters

U.S. economic growth in the fourth quarter of 2017 showed the “biggest gain in consumer spending in three years,” Reuters reports. “Gross domestic product expanded at a 2.9 percent annual rate in the final three months of 2017.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=133c879a6e63b1b752b284ac6d6aaaa91e6f17f0ee48d24e4f2da46f542716b140200dc79230587bb4ce67774a81a39511b1c01cfb5b48c7

US, Mexico Open New Maritime Front in Drug War

- The Associated Press

“The United States, Mexico and Colombia will target drug smugglers off South America's Pacific coast in an operation that is scheduled to begin Sunday,” The Associated Press reports from U.S. Coast Guard officials. While the U.S. and Mexico continue to address the issues of immigration and trade, “the two countries are joining forces on the high seas like never before to go after drug smugglers.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=133c879a6e63b1b755c235f9670025952985873f87f04a5c005637fc8336d784ce09bffb2d7f3d2786ad9bf3446f1a718e287c7fe4635308
EPA Head Scott Pruitt Visits Major Wyoming Coal Mine, Preaches End of 'War on Fossil Fuels'

- Casper Star Tribune

This week, Environmental Protection Agency Administrator Scott Pruitt visited Wyoming on the invitation of Sens. John Barrasso (R-WY) and Mike Enzi (R-WY). Administrator Pruitt “said it was time for the agency to reverse what he described as a political attack on the fossil fuel industry,” Heather Richards reports.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=133c879a6e63b1b7758935be874cd98e59a82c3f9efa39ff5fff7fc00167c1d474798bbdbcfb85d005c2139d501c9f82eb1fec506d19b9d5

Melania Trump Makes Surprise Visit to Florida Hospital to Celebrate Easter

- Washington Examiner

First Lady Melania Trump visited St. Mary’s Medical Center in Florida this week, delivering Easter baskets ahead of this Sunday’s holiday. “So great to spend time with some of their brave patients and hard working doctors and nurses,” the First Lady wrote after her visit.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=133c879a6e63b1b75220775b748036764c6f50ed6989657f11c41d0c09aa6a0eafb2f6cd3c121db6ed216cd692ce1edfc94edfeb9c50cec6

body:

Peter,
We have our first **FEC end-of-quarter deadline in just 1 day.**
This is crucial. Our financial records will be released and every establishment operative in Washington will pour over them looking for an excuse to say that we can’t win in November.
Right now we’re only 74 donors short of reaching 500 Founding Donors by the end of March.
I need your help now more than ever.
[Chip In to become a **Founding Donor** before March is over, and join the movement to take the Washington establishment down!](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-odhuuld-ydllhlurty-y/)
[](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-odhuuld-ydllhlurty-j/)
[Any donation will help our cause. So please consider a founding donor donation of $25, $50, $100, or even $1000 today.](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-odhuuld-ydllhlurty-t/)
The swell of support that we have seen since announcing my candidacy has been amazing. I truly appreciate you and every single one my supporters and their passion.
It’s clear, people are clamoring for a Senator who actually represents their conservative values, not the values of the Washington elite.
But Mitch McConnell and his establishment are already on the attack, releasing ads that lie about my record and calling my supporters “lunatics” for wanting a true conservative in the Senate.
**That’s why I need your help.**
[Become a Founding Donor now and help fight back against the establishment!](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-odhuuld-ydllhlurty-i/)
The attacks we’ve seen against us are just the beginning. They will look to defame and belittle us any chance they can.
I’m not going to sugar coat it, they have a massive war chest filled by all of their special interest and lobbyist friends.
If we want to truly send a message that the people of Mississippi want a bulldog that fights for them, the time to stand up together is now.
[Chip in now and let’s send a clear message to the establishment that their time is almost up!](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-odhuuld-ydllhlurty-d/)
Thank you,
Chris McDaniel

Since 2008, we've lost about a thousand state legislative seats, 12 governorships, and 26 state legislatures -- but 2018 is the year we can win them back.

Here's the honest truth, Derek:

Since 2008, we've lost about a thousand state legislative seats, 12 governorships, and 26 state legislatures, and both houses of Congress -- but 2018 is the year we can start winning them back.

When Tom and I say we need to reach 50 million voters to elect Democrats nationwide, we aren't just saying that to check off a box. That's what it will take to win this November.

Friend, I'm about to send Leah an update on our progress for this first end-of-quarter push of 2018 and we haven’t heard from you yet. I attached her email below so you get a chance to hear from Leah about how important this deadline is to our race. But I'll give you the quick version here: if we don't make our goals before this deadline our campaign will be in trouble. We’re $8,225 short of our goal now. Every donation for the next 16 hours will be matched dollar for dollar, but you have to do it on this email. Can you step up now? Leah is counting on you. Jess Campaign Manager Leah for Senate Friend, we’re just 1 day away from the biggest test our campaign has faced. It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline of 2018, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goals. We have $16,039 left to go. As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of the Washington elite. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office. But Friend, if our end-of-quarter numbers are big, the Washington establishment will not be able to ignore us. If we work together, I'm positive we can reach our goal. To make it even easier, one generous donor has stepped up and agreed to match every donation we get before our END OF QUARTER deadline. That means a gift of $50, is really $100. If you give $100, it's really $200, and so on... Don't pass up the opportunity to chip in now! Friend, I know you and I both have had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative change. But to do that, we have to raise that $16,039 before this deadline. Please, Friend, let’s show them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation, and close out this quarter with a huge bang. Thank you, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

Peter,

New polls show our odds of flipping the House aren't guaranteed.

While Democrats still hold a lead over Republicans, it has narrowed over the past month.

_Cook Political Report_ says Democrats need to be at least six points ahead on the generic ballot to have a chance at flipping the House. And right now we are right on that edge. So we need to step up our support of our candidates running to help flip the House.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $350,000 End-of-Quarter goal by midnight tonight so our candidates have the resources to turn the House blue:**

name: Rahsheim Wright
subject: FW: Putting people first
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0a/767134fb/5ca59d1e/433826b7/1646589903/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hey there, I wanted to make sure you saw Donna's email. One reason I joined her campaign for Prince George's County Executive is that she believes every member of our community deserves a seat at the table. But in order to make that a reality, **[she needs your help. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0a/767134fb/5ca59d1e/433826b4/1646589903/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** I hope you can join us. Let's build a better Prince George's County. -Rahsheim \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Donna Edwards <[info@donnaforprincegeorges.org](mailto:info@donnaforprincegeorges.org)>
Date: Fri, Mar 30, 2018 at 3:31 PM
Subject: Putting People First
Hi Friend, As Women's History Month comes to a close, I reflect on my personal hero, Shirley Chisholm. She was the first Black woman elected to Congress, and the first woman ever to seek the Democratic Party presidential nomination. I am reminded of the time she famously said, "If they don't give you a seat at the table, bring a folding chair." As Prince George's County Executive, I will give working families, women, small businesses, and young people a seat at the table. I will make sure that their voices are heard, and that we create policies that put the hard-working people of Prince George's County first. It's time to end the reign of those who submit to the whims of wealthy developers and donors. I need your help to make my commitment a reality.**[Can you make a donation of $10 or more to help me continue the work of ensuring the needs of every member of our community are met?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0a/767134fb/5ca59d1e/433826b4/1646589903/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website") ** As County Executive, my promise to you is that I will be committed to creating a better community for the hard-working people who call this county home--not to lining the wallets of big developers. Please help me raise another $12,489 to reach my goal of $15,000. I cannot win this race alone, and that is why I am asking for your support.**[I hope you will consider making a contribution of $10 or more so I can continue the work of my people-powered campaign for Prince George's County Executive. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0a/767134fb/5ca59d1e/433826b4/1646589903/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Thank you for your continued support. In the "unbossed and unbought" spirit of Shirley Chisholm, together we will create a better Prince George's County. Donna
---
|
---
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0a/767134fb/5ca59d1e/433826b5/1646589903/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0a/767134fb/5ca59d1e/433826b2/1646589903/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/donnafedwards") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0a/767134fb/5ca59d1e/433826b3/1646589903/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/donnafedwards/")

Our first 2018 deadline is at midnight. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79d65/2f5ea88d/72833ea7/2cbc8336/3024160065/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freeze-eoq?utm_source=ema_2018-03-31_eoq-5-control&refcode=ema_2018-03-31_eoq-5-control&utm_campaign=eoq-5-control&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'll get straight to the point. There's only a few hours left before our midnight fundraising deadline -- and we can't afford to come up short. It's our first deadline for 2018 after not raising a dime for the three months of the legislative session freeze. But with Republicans coming out of the gates fast, we can't let them outpace us. With so much at stake this year across the country, it's crucial we match the GOP dollar for dollar. [**Will you donate $5 -- or more if you can -- to help us hit our March goal? name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Will you give me a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Friends -
In a short moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation before tonight's FEC fundraising deadline to help Bernie elect and mobilize progressives in 2018. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- means so much.
This year's election is an extraordinary opportunity for progressives. There are countless Republican-controlled seats at risk at all levels of government.
We don't have to fill them with the same candidates long supported by the political elite. We can win those races with progressives -- progressives who support Medicare for all, free college tuition, a $15 minimum wage and so much more.
So this year, Bernie's going to travel the country to help do just that. But those big rallies that energize and mobilize voters, they cost money. And you know Bernie, he isn't going around the country begging millionaires and billionaires for campaign donations. If we're going to elect a record number of progressives in 2018, that's on us. So I have to ask:
**[Can Bernie count on you to make a $3 donation before tonight's midnight FEC fundraising deadline to keep him traveling across the country to elect and mobilize progressives? This is important, and Bernie needs your help to make it happen.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-deadline?refcode=em180331-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-deadline?refcode=em180331-t1-full")**
Not only does your donation help Bernie continue his work, but it sends a very powerful message to the political establishment in this country that our political revolution is alive and well.
Thank you for adding that donation before midnight. I know it means a lot to Bernie.
All my best,
Jeff Weaver

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Remember what Sen. Sanders told us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Friends,
Not so long ago, Senator Bernie Sanders said in order to create real, sustainable political change, all of us must be deeply involved in the process. He had a political revolution in mind, and millions of us answered his call to action. As a result, Our Revolution was born.
Since then, Our Revolution has organized and empowered hundreds of thousands of people around the country to become grassroots activists and leaders in their own communities. These people are hard at work right now on primary campaigns to hold the Democratic Party accountable and they are winning more support each day. **Just look at the move to Medicare for All --when Sen. Sanders introduced it just a few years ago, he was the only senator to sponsor the bill. Now, sixteen senators have joined him.**
It takes a lot of hard work, and we have a long way to go, but already your participation is changing the way politics works in America. **We can't lose this momentum for change.** [**Chip in $5 before our deadline to help Our Revolution members around the country continue organizing for progressive change.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac14/bed43eb/592587c2/75fe6f05/72453691/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180331-full")
This is about far more than just resisting President Trump. We needed a revolution before Trump, and we will need one after he's gone. It's not going to come from Washington--the political revolution has to come from you.
Senator Sanders' 2016 presidential campaign was not about business as usual, it was about calling the question--what type of America do we want to be? How do we push back against a corrupt system and create a political environment that works for all of us and not just a few? You came out by the thousands all over this country to hear the Senator share a vision for the future. That moment was about a movement of collective consciousness. A movement of expectation. **A movement about you!**
_You_ are the political revolution. So let's keep building it and ensure Bernie's vision for a revolution becomes America's reality. [**Make a $5 contribution, or any amount you can afford today, and let's build this political revolution together.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac14/bed43eb/592587c2/75fe6f05/72453691/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180331-full")
In solidarity,
Nina Turner

Our Revolution

body:
This election means too much for us to miss the mark tonight. There's too much at stake -- and the opportunity ahead of us is too significant -- to fall short of our goals.

Team --

This election means too much for us to miss the mark tonight.

There's too much at stake -- and the opportunity ahead of us is too significant -- to fall short of our goals.

[**So before tonight 's midnight deadline, I'm asking you to chip in $1.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20180331-Schumer-V2-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Now that Doug Jones is a sitting senator, we only need to flip two seats to take back the majority. And I truly believe we have the candidates to get the job done.

**Just look at Jacky Rosen and Kyrsten Sinema.**

In Nevada, Jacky is running against Senator Dean Heller, who spent all last year waffling on whether or not to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- before folding like we predicted and voting with President Trump.

Jacky is the first person in her family to graduate from college, working as a waitress to pay her bills. She broke barriers as a computer programmer in a male-dominated industry. In 2016, she won her race for Congress, despite the fact that her district was carried by Trump.

In Arizona, Kyrsten is running for an open seat -- left vacant when Sen. Jeff Flake decided not to seek reelection. We don't yet know which Republican she'll face, but President Trump has been a cheerleader for Kelli Ward in the GOP primary and let's not forget that Joe Arpaio is also in the race.

Regardless, Kyrsten will be a tough candidate. She's an Arizona native. When her dad lost his job, her family faced challenges. For a time, as a child, they were homeless, living in an abandoned gas station. But she put herself through school. She served in the state legislature and is now in Congress.

If we can protect our incumbents -- and help elect these two women -- Democrats will hold the Senate majority in the next Congress.

But the first step is to meet tonight's fundraising goal.

[**Make a donation before midnight tonight, and it will be triple matched >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20180331-Schumer-V2-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Chuck

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: first FEC deadline of 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Tonight is the first FEC deadline of 2018. Read Chris' message, and [**donate now to ensure Democrats around the country have the resources to fight back against Republican attacks and take back the Senate in November >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91841/70cdc2ba/4609aec4/3903692/4237234515/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/fecsenatedeadline?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+donate+now+to+ensure+Democrats+around+th&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2")

\------Begin Forwarded Message------

> Last Saturday, I was proud to march with incredible student leaders from Maryland and around the country to demand real action to save lives by passing common sense gun laws.
>
> Now that the March for Our Lives is over, the NRA and the gun lobby are counting on us to give up and go away. But we are not going to do that. We must show them that we are in this fight until Congress takes meaningful action to end the carnage and reduce the daily toll of gun violence in our country.
>
> The political math is simple -- to pass life-saving national legislation, we need to have the votes. And to get the votes, we need to win elections. That means winning big Senate races in states like Florida, Nevada and elsewhere where Republican Senate candidates have A+ ratings from the NRA, while Democratic Senate candidates support common-sense measures like a universal background check and a ban on military-style assault rifles.
>
> [**I hope you will stand with me in this critical fight to help Senate Democratic candidates win this November so we can make progress on this and many other issues. Please donate now, before the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline of 2018 on Saturday, to help me ensure we have the resources to stand up to attacks from the NRA and win key Senate elections in November >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91841/70cdc2ba/4609aec4/3903693/4237234515/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fecsenatedeadline?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+I+hope+you+will+stand+with+me+in+this+cr&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2")
>
> The terrible toll of gun violence has been taking lives in Maryland and around the country for way too long. No state or family is immune. Despite our strong gun laws here in Maryland, 62 percent of the guns used in crime in Baltimore come from states with looser laws. Prayers are not enough. Focused political efforts are necessary.
>
> [**The first FEC deadline of the 2018 midterms is on Saturday, and we need your help now to win these campaigns.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91841/70cdc2ba/4609aec4/3903690/4237234515/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fecsenatedeadline?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+The+first+FEC+deadline+of+the+2018+midte&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_2_2")
>
> In recent months we have all been moved by the enthusiasm and activism of young people who have mobilized and organized to make our country a better and safer place. Since the election of Donald Trump, people of all ages here in our state and across the country have stepped up to make their voices heard and to make a difference.
>
> I am proud to work with each of you and to represent Maryland at this critical moment. Working together I know we can get this job done.
>
> Thank you for all that you do!
>
> Chris Van Hollen
> U.S. Senator
>
>
>
>
>

name: Bob Casey
subject: it's not looking good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
Important update for you:

My campaign manager just sent me the final fundraising update before tonight's end of quarter deadline, and we are still $3,700 short of where we need to be. She told me if we don't meet our goal, she's going to have to take the difference straight out of our ad budget.

We can't let that happen, and here's why: ever since I voted against the GOP's tax scheme, they've steadily ramped up their attacks against me. I sided with working families, not corporations or billionaires, and big Republican spenders aren't happy about that. President Trump personally recruited a Republican congressman to challenge me, and has promised to campaign for him here in Pennsylvania. And earlier this month, the Koch brothers singled me out as one of a handful of Democrats that they'll be spending $20 million against specifically because I voted against a tax cut for them.

You and I know just how important it is for Democrats to take back Congress in 2018 and put a stop to the president's dangerous anti-middle-class agenda. But that will not happen if Republicans take over this Senate seat, so we need to close our $3,700 budget gap by midnight tonight.

Supporters like you are already making a huge difference in this race. It would mean a lot if you could take the next step by becoming a campaign donor before our deadline at midnight tonight. Just $5 or whatever you can spare will go a long way toward closing our budget gap and pushing back against the GOP's attacks.

Here's the link: **_[https://secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6563/51dbcc2a/d94ac24/3a3f3ba/2961915450/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDMzMV9mcjFfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180331_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,
Bob

And earlier this month, the Koch brothers singled me out as one of a handful of Democrats that they'll be spending $20 million against specifically because I voted against a tax cut for them. You and I know just how important it is for Democrats to take back Congress in 2018 and put a stop to the president's dangerous anti-middle-class agenda. But that will not happen if Republicans take over this Senate seat, so we need to close our $3,700 budget gap by midnight tonight. Supporters like you are already making a huge difference in this race. It would mean a lot if you could take the next step by becoming a campaign donor before our deadline at midnight tonight. Just $5 or whatever you can spare will go a long way toward closing our budget gap and pushing back against the GOP's attacks. Here's the link: "" Thanks, Bob

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: You can't win what you don't fight for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I believe that Democrats must compete for every vote, in every race, in every state -- because you can't win what you don't fight for.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180331-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team --

As we fight to level the playing field for working Americans, we face powerful opponents ready to silence us.

The mega-wealthy Republican donors on the other side have the money to dump millions of dollars into Senate races like mine. They think they can take us down in a blink.

We don't have that kind of money -- and we don't want it. Instead, our campaigns are fueled by the people we fight for every day: Working people across the country chipping in $5 or $10 at a time. That's why I'm asking:

[**Will you contribute to the DSCC to help my Democratic Senate colleagues and me fight back against the GOP super PAC attacks before tonight 's fundraising deadline?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180331-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

If we're going to stop Donald Trump and the Republicans from rigging the system for billionaires and big corporations, we need to win elections everywhere -- starting with taking back the Senate this November.

It won't be easy. Ten of our Democratic Senators face tough, expensive re-election campaigns this November in states that Donald Trump won in 2016.

But I believe that Democrats must compete for every vote, in every race, in every state -- because you can't win what you don't fight for.

The billionaire Republican donors can be scary -- but they're not unbeatable. If we work together and fight for what we believe in -- today, tomorrow, and every day -- then we will win.

**I 'm fighting my heart out to elect Senate Democrats this November who will stand up and fight for the people, and we need you with us. Please, pitch in $1 before tonight's deadline:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/we-can-win**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20180331-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Elizabeth

name: bob@bobcasey.com
subject: quick update for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
It's coming, and we need to be ready.
